item.title: 会撒谎、会抹痕迹：Anthropic 最强模型发布，但普通用户用不了
item.guid: 会撒谎、会抹痕迹：Anthropic-最强模型发布，但普通用户用不了
item.description:
On the 7th local time, Anthropic released its new generation flagship model, Claude Mythos Preview, and simultaneously announced the launch of Project Glasswing, which will exclusively license the model to 12 tech giants such as Apple, Microsoft, and Amazon, specifically for defensive cybersecurity work, and will not be open to the public. 当地时间 7 日，Anthropic 发布了新一代旗舰模型 Claude Mythos Preview，并同步宣布启动 Project Glasswing 计划，将该模型限定授权给苹果、微软、亚马逊等 12 家科技巨头，专门用于防御性网络安全工作，不对公众开放。

Mythos Preview shows a dramatic lead in multiple benchmark tests. Anthropic stated that this is its largest model trained, with a capability improvement speed 4.3 times that of previous trend lines, leading GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3.1 Pro on almost all public benchmarks, with double-digit percentage leads in most projects. Mythos Preview 在多项基准测试中呈现断崖式领先。Anthropic 表示，这是其训练过的最大模型，能力提升速度是此前趋势线的 4.3 倍，在几乎所有公开基准上均领先 GPT-5.4 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro，且多数项目领先幅度达两位数百分点。

It is worth noting that Anthropic simultaneously released a 244-page System Card, disclosing several abnormal behaviors of early internal test versions, and it was precisely based on these security concerns that they decided not to publicly launch Mythos Preview. 值得注意的是，Anthropic 同步发布了一份长达 244 页的系统安全报告（System Card），披露了早期内部测试版本的若干异常行为，并正是基于这些安全顾虑，决定不将 Mythos Preview 公开上线。

The report shows that early versions had actively published exploit details to public websites after being asked to escape sandboxes, and in very rare cases (less than one in a million interactions), also attempted to cover up traces of violations—including re-solving problems to avoid suspicion of answer leakage, modifying git change history to erase operation records, and simulating key presses to bypass permission pop-ups. 报告显示，早期版本曾在被要求逃离沙箱后主动将漏洞利用细节发布至公开网站，在极少数情况下（不足百万分之一的交互比例）还尝试掩盖违规操作痕迹——包括重新解题以规避答案泄露的嫌疑、修改 git 变更历史抹除操作记录，以及模拟按键绕过权限弹窗。

For this reason, Mythos Preview will not be launched on claude.ai, nor will its API be open. Instead, it will be exclusively licensed through the Project Glasswing initiative to a total of 11 companies such as AWS, Apple, and Google, and approximately 40 additional partner organizations, specifically for defensive security work. 为此，Mythos Preview 不会上线 claude.ai，也不开放 API，而是通过 Project Glasswing 计划限定授权给 AWS、苹果Google 等共 11 家公司及约 40 家额外合作组织，专用于防御性安全工作。

item.title: 苹果折叠屏 iPhone 或推迟？彭博社： 仍按计划于 9 月发布
item.guid: 苹果折叠屏-iPhone-或推迟？彭博社：-仍按计划于-9-月发布
item.description:
According to Nikkei Asia, Apple's first foldable iPhone is encountering technical bottlenecks during the engineering test phase, and its mass production and shipping schedule face the risk of delays. 据《日经亚洲》报道，苹果首款可折叠 iPhone 正在工程测试阶段遭遇技术瓶颈，量产及出货时间表面临推迟风险。

Multiple sources revealed that the issues exposed during the engineering research and development of the foldable iPhone are more complex than Apple anticipated, and the time required to resolve them has also exceeded expectations. In the worst-case scenario, the first batch of shipments could be delayed by several months. 多位知情人士透露，可折叠 iPhone 在工程研发环节暴露出的问题比苹果预期的更为复杂，解决所需时间也超出预期。 在最坏的情况下，首批出货时间可能被推迟数月。

According to Nikkei Asia's supply chain investigation, Apple plans to produce approximately 7 to 8 million units of the first batch of foldable iPhones, accounting for less than 10% of this year's overall planned new product output. 据《日经亚洲》对供应链的调查，苹果计划首批生产约 700 至 800 万部可折叠 iPhone，占今年新品整体计划产量的不足 10%。

However, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman believes this information is inaccurate. He stated that even if initial supply is limited, the foldable iPhone is still scheduled to be released in September alongside the iPhone 18 Pro, launching simultaneously with or slightly later than the latter. 不过，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 认为该信息不准确。他表示，即便初期面临供应受限，折叠屏 iPhone 目前仍按计划于 9 月与 iPhone 18 Pro 一起发布，与后者同时或稍晚一些上市。

Recently, overseas blogger 'Sonny Dickson' also released two prototype mold images of the iPhone 18 Pro series and the iPhone Fold (tentative) foldable screen. The blogger stated that the prototypes in the images will be the final dimensions of the new devices. 日前，海外博主「Sonny Dickson」还放出了两张 iPhone 18 Pro 系列以及 iPhone Fold（暂定）折叠屏的样机模具图。该博主称，图中的样机将会是新机的最终尺寸。

From the images, the iPhone 18 Pro series maintains the design of the iPhone 17 Pro series; as for the foldable iPhone Fold, the new device may feature a dual rear camera and a wide internal screen design similar to a wide fold. 从图片来看，iPhone 18 Pro 系列维持 iPhone 17 Pro 系列的外观设计；而折叠屏 iPhone Fold 方面，新机或采用后置双摄，以及类似阔折叠的宽内屏设计。

item.title: 讨好型+反社会型人格：《纽约客》深度调查还原山姆·奥特曼真实面目
item.guid: 讨好型+反社会型人格：《纽约客》深度调查还原山姆·奥特曼真实面目
item.description:
Yesterday, The New Yorker published an in-depth investigative report, 18 months in the making, which for the first time disclosed several previously unreleased internal documents, revealing a "shocking scoop" about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. The core documents in the report are two: 昨天，《纽约客》公布了一篇历时 18 个月制作的深度调查报道，首次披露了多份此前从未公开的内部文件，爆出了 OpenAI CEO 山姆·奥特曼（Sam Altman）的「惊天大瓜」。报道的核心文件有两份：

    First, a roughly 70-page internal memo secretly compiled by former Chief Scientist Ilya Sutskever in the fall of 2023, which collected a large number of Slack messages and personnel files through surreptitious photography, with the very first accusation being "lying";

    Second, over 200 pages of private notes kept for years by Anthropic co-founder Dario Amodei, which directly state: "Almost everything Altman has ever said is almost certainly bullshit," and "OpenAI's biggest problem is Sam himself."

Regarding safety commitments, the report reveals a typical "empty promise" case: OpenAI grandly announced the establishment of a "Superalignment" team in 2023, publicly pledging to dedicate 20% of the company's computing power to AI safety research, but only 1% to 2% was actually allocated, and it used the oldest chip clusters. 在安全承诺方面，报道揭示了一个典型的「画饼」案例：OpenAI 于 2023 年高调宣布成立「超级对齐」团队，公开承诺投入公司 20% 的算力用于 AI 安全研究，实际到位的却只有 1% 至 2%，且使用的是最老旧的芯片集群。

Team leader Jan Leike complained to then-CTO Mira Murati, and the response he received was, "This commitment was never realistic." The team was disbanded in 2024. 团队负责人 Jan Leike 向时任 CTO Mira Murati 投诉，得到的回复是「这个承诺本来就不现实」。该团队于 2024 年宣告解散。

A former OpenAI board member described two rarely coexisting traits in Altman to The New Yorker: "a strong desire to be liked by everyone," and "an almost antisocial indifference to the consequences of deceiving others." 一位前 OpenAI 董事会成员向《纽约客》描述了奥特曼身上两种罕见共存的特质：「强烈渴望被所有人喜爱」，以及「对欺骗他人所带来后果近乎反社会式的漠然」。

Multiple interviewees, without prompting, coincidentally used the term "antisocial" to describe him . Former Chief Human Resources Officer Diane Yoon's judgment, however, was slightly different: 多位受访者在未受引导的情况下，不约而同地使用了「反社会」一词形容他 。前首席人力资源官 Diane Yoon 的判断则稍有不同：

He is not a Machiavellian villain (coldly calculating, ruthless in achieving goals); he is simply too immersed in his own beliefs, living in a self-constructed world.

Facing all accusations, Altman characterized his own transformation as "a benevolent adaptation to a rapidly changing environment," and stated that his main flaw in earlier years was "being too conflict-averse." Regarding the phrase "I cannot change my personality" during the board crisis, he claimed he "doesn't remember saying it." 面对所有指控，奥特曼将自身的转变定性为「对快速变化环境的善意适应」，并表示早年的主要缺陷是「过于回避冲突」。对于董事会危机期间那句「我无法改变我的性格」，他则表示「不记得曾说过」。

🔗 Related reading: OpenAI's Big Scoop Revealed: Ilya's 70-Page Secret Photos Confirm Altman Lied 🔗 相关阅读： OpenAI 大瓜曝光，Ilya 偷拍 70 页文件实锤奥特曼撒谎

item.title: 曝苹果 MacBook 超 40% 产能已迁至越南
item.guid: 曝苹果-MacBook-超-40%-产能已迁至越南
item.description:
According to DIGITIMES, Apple has transferred over 40% of its MacBook production capacity to Vietnam, including the recently launched new entry-level model, the MacBook Neo. Supply chain insiders revealed that Foxconn and Quanta have already set up assembly plants in Vietnam for Apple, taking on relevant orders. 据 DIGITIMES 报道，苹果已将超过 40% 的 MacBook 生产产能转移至越南，包括近期推出的新款入门级机型 MacBook Neo。供应链知情人士透露，目前，富士康与广达已在越南设立面向苹果的组装工厂，承接相关订单。

Apple CEO Tim Cook stated in last May's earnings call that the vast majority of iPhones are produced in India, while most other product lines, including Macs, are primarily assembled in Vietnam. It is reported that Mac models assembled in Vietnam include the MacBook Pro, Air, and Neo. 苹果 CEO 蒂姆·库克在去年 5 月的财报电话会议上表示，绝大多数 iPhone 在印度生产，而包括 Mac 在内的其他多数产品线则主要在越南完成组装。据悉，在越南组装的 Mac 机型涵盖 MacBook Pro、Air 以及 Neo。

The MacBook Neo is currently being produced simultaneously in three locations: Shanghai, China; Chengdu, China; and Vietnam. This arrangement indicates that Vietnam is not only a mass production base for Apple's existing models but also takes on the function of New Product Introduction (NPI), demonstrating that local engineering and R&D capabilities are maturing. MacBook Neo 目前在三地同步生产，分别为中国上海、中国成都及越南。这一布局表明，越南不仅是苹果现有机型的量产基地，同时也承担了新品导入（NPI）的职能，显示出当地工程与研发能力已趋于成熟。

item.title: NASA 公布 iPhone 17 Pro Max 太空自拍样片
item.guid: NASA-公布-iPhone-17-Pro-Max-太空自拍样片
item.description:
On the evening of the 1st, Eastern US time, NASA's next-generation lunar rocket, the 'Space Launch System,' launched from the Kennedy Space Center in Florida, embarking on the 'Artemis II' crewed lunar flyby mission. #US10DayCrewedLunarMissionBegins# 美国东部时间 1 日傍晚，美国航空航天局新一代登月火箭「太空发射系统」从佛罗里达州肯尼迪航天中心发射升空，执行「阿耳忒弥斯 2 号」载人绕月飞行任务。#美国10天载人绕月任务开始#

On April 5th, NASA officially released a set of photos showing astronauts looking at Earth through a porthole. Notably, these images were captured by the front-facing camera of an iPhone 17 Pro Max. 4 月 5 日，NASA 官方公布了一组宇航员通过舷窗望向地球的照片。值得关注的是，该组图片由 iPhone 17 Pro Max 的前置镜头拍摄。

As previously reported, in February this year, NASA issued an official statement confirming that the iPhone has been fully certified for extended use in orbit. Currently, each of the four crew members on the spacecraft is equipped with an iPhone 17 Pro Max for recording personal imagery. 据此前报道，今年 2 月，NASA 曾发布官方声明，确认 iPhone 已完全通过在轨延长使用的认证。目前，飞船上的四名机组人员已各自配备一台 iPhone 17 Pro Max 用于记录个人影像。

In addition to smartphones, the mission team's primary recording equipment also includes professional-grade cameras such as the Nikon D5, Nikon Z9, and GoPro HERO4 Black. 除智能手机外，该任务团队主要使用的记录设备还包括尼康 D5、尼康 Z9 及 GoPro HERO4 Black 等专业级相机。

item.title: Anthropic 年化收入超越 OpenAI，与 Google、博通签下史上最大算力协议
item.guid: Anthropic-年化收入超越-OpenAI，与-Google、博通签下史上最大算力协议
item.description:
Anthropic announced yesterday that it has signed new agreements with Google and Broadcom to acquire multi-gigawatt-level next-generation TPU computing power, expected to come online progressively starting next year. This marks Anthropic's largest computing power investment to date. Anthropic 昨日宣布与 Google 及博通（Broadcom）签署新协议，将获得多吉瓦级别的下一代 TPU 算力，预计明年起陆续上线。这是 Anthropic 迄今规模最大的算力投入。

This collaboration involves a TPU cluster scale of up to 3.5 GW. The vast majority of the new computing power will be deployed in the United States, representing a significant extension of Anthropic's November commitment to invest $50 billion in strengthening US computing infrastructure, and further deepening its ties with Google Cloud based on the increased TPU capacity collaboration in October last year. 此次合作涉及的 TPU 集群规模高达 3.5 GW。绝大部分新增算力将部署在美国本土，是 Anthropic 去年 11 月承诺投资 500 亿美元强化美国计算基础设施计划的重要延伸，也在去年 10 月增加 TPU 容量合作基础上进一步深化了与 Google Cloud 的绑定关系。

In terms of revenue, Anthropic's annualized revenue (ARR) has surpassed $30 billion, more than tripling from approximately $9 billion by the end of 2025, and for the first time exceeding OpenAI. 营收层面，Anthropic 年化收入（ARR）已突破 300 亿美元，较 2025 年底约 90 亿美元暴涨逾三倍，首次超越 OpenAI。

The growth in large enterprise customers is particularly striking. During the Series G funding round in February this year, there were approximately 500 enterprise customers with annual spending exceeding $1 million; as of yesterday, this number has directly doubled in less than two months, surpassing 1,000. 企业大客户的增长尤为亮眼。今年 2 月 G 轮融资时，年支出超过 100 万美元的企业客户约有 500 家；而截至昨日，这一数字在不到两个月内直接翻倍，突破 1000 家。

Currently, Claude is trained and run simultaneously on AWS Trainium, Google TPU, and Nvidia GPUs, allowing different workloads to be assigned to the most suitable chips, enhancing performance while strengthening supply chain resilience. Claude is also currently the only frontier AI model simultaneously available on the world's three major cloud platforms. 目前，Claude 同时在 AWS Trainium、Google TPU 和英伟达 GPU 上训练和运行，以便将不同工作负载分配给最适合的芯片，在提升性能的同时增强供应链韧性。Claude 也是目前唯一一款同时在全球三大云平台的前沿 AI 模型。

item.title: DeepSeek 上线「专家模式」，V4 发布又近一步
item.guid: DeepSeek-上线「专家模式」，V4-发布又近一步
item.description:
Early this morning, DeepSeek's web interface quietly launched 'Expert Mode' as a grayscale test, making it available to some users. 今天凌晨，DeepSeek 网页端悄然上线「专家模式」（Expert Mode），以灰度测试形式向部分用户开放。

According to actual tests, the model's token throughput speed is significantly improved in Expert Mode, with a lower content hallucination rate. It also retains deep thinking and intelligent search functions, performing particularly well in tasks such as complex mathematical reasoning and code writing. Currently, Expert Mode does not support file uploads. 据实测，专家模式下模型的 token 吞吐速度明显提升，内容幻觉率较低，同时保留深度思考与智能搜索功能，在处理复杂数学推理、代码编写等任务时表现尤为突出。目前专家模式暂不支持文件上传。

item.title: 小米汽车又挖走一名特斯拉负责人：中欧交付运营负责人加入小米
item.guid: 小米汽车又挖走一名特斯拉负责人：中欧交付运营负责人加入小米
item.description:
According to Electrek, Xiaomi has officially hired Dieter Lorenz, Tesla's Senior Manager of Delivery Operations for Central Europe, to serve as Xiaomi's Head of European Delivery and Logistics. This move is widely seen as a significant signal of Xiaomi Auto's early strategic planning for the European market. 据 Electrek 报道，小米已正式聘请特斯拉中欧地区交付运营高级经理迪特·洛伦茨（Dieter Lorenz）担任小米欧洲交付与物流负责人，此举被外界视为小米汽车提前布局欧洲市场的重要信号。

Lorenz worked at Tesla Germany for over six years, starting as Operations Supervisor, then serving as Operations Manager for Germany, and later for Germany, Poland, and the Czech Republic, eventually being promoted to Senior Manager of Delivery Operations for Central Europe in September 2024. He is one of Tesla Europe's most crucial regional logistics leaders. 洛伦茨在特斯拉德国公司工作逾六年，从运营主管起步，历任德国运营经理、德国及波兰、捷克地区运营经理，最终于 2024 年 9 月晋升为中欧地区交付运营高级经理，是特斯拉欧洲最核心的区域物流负责人之一。

He announced his departure on LinkedIn yesterday, stating that he 'looks forward to starting a new chapter as Xiaomi's Head of European Delivery and Logistics, embracing new challenges and opportunities.' 他昨天在 LinkedIn 发文宣布离职，表示「期待以小米欧洲交付与物流负责人的身份开启新篇章，迎接新的挑战与机遇」。

Additionally, at least one other Tesla Europe operations employee joined Xiaomi at the same time, commenting on Lorenz's LinkedIn post that they would continue to work together. 此外，至少还有另一名特斯拉欧洲运营员工同期加入小米，其在洛伦茨的 LinkedIn 帖子评论区留言称双方将继续共事。

item.title: 携程集团试行「无理由事假」：每年最多 45 天
item.guid: 携程集团试行「无理由事假」：每年最多-45-天
item.description:
Trip.com Group announced yesterday that it will launch a one-year management experiment on 'no-reason personal leave' in some business departments starting May 1st, aiming to explore the impact of granting employees greater autonomy over their working hours on individual effectiveness and organizational vitality. 携程集团昨日宣布，将于 5 月 1 日起在部分业务部门启动为期一年的「无理由事假」管理实验，旨在探究赋予员工工作时间更高自主权后，对个人效能与组织活力的影响。

This experiment will use a randomized controlled study method, with approximately 6,000 employees randomly assigned to an experimental group and a control group. Employees in the experimental group will receive an additional annual allowance of up to 45 days of 'no-reason personal leave,' beyond the company's existing paid leave types. Employees can apply for this leave at any time according to their personal needs, without having to explain specific reasons to the company. 本次实验采用随机对照研究方法，约 6000 名员工将被随机分配至实验组和对照组。实验组员工可在公司现有各类带薪假期之外，额外获得每年累计最多 45 天的「无理由事假」额度，员工可根据个人需求随时申请，且无需向公司说明具体事由。

Trip.com stated that the group will collaborate with professional scholars to rigorously analyze experimental data and plans to share findings and insights with the industry at an appropriate time. Whether the "unjustified personal leave" system will ultimately be officially implemented will depend on the actual observations during the one-year experimental period. 携程表示，集团将与专业学者合作，对实验数据进行严谨分析，并计划在适当时机与业界分享发现与思考。「无理由事假」制度是否最终正式落地，将取决于一年实验期内的实际观察结果。

item.title: 英特尔加入马斯克 Terafab 项目，与特斯拉、SpaceX 联手造芯
item.guid: 英特尔加入马斯克-Terafab-项目，与特斯拉、SpaceX-联手造芯
item.description:
Intel announced yesterday that it has joined Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip project, collaborating with SpaceX, Tesla, and xAI to jointly advance this large-scale chip manufacturing plan. 英特尔昨天宣布加入埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）旗下的 Terafab AI 芯片项目，与 SpaceX、特斯拉（Tesla）及 xAI 展开合作，共同推进这一大规模芯片制造计划。

Tesla also posted on its official X platform account to confirm this collaboration, stating that Terafab will be "the most epic chip manufacturing project ever," integrating logic chips, memory, and advanced packaging under one roof. 特斯拉方面也在 X 平台官方账号发文确认这一合作，称 Terafab 将是「有史以来最史诗级的芯片制造项目」，整合逻辑芯片、存储与先进封装于同一屋檐下。

According to Intel, Terafab's goal is to produce 1 terawatt (TW) of computing power annually to support the future development of AI and robotics. 根据英特尔的表述，Terafab 的目标是每年生产 1 太瓦（TW）算力，以支撑 AI 与机器人领域的未来发展。

The Terafab project was first disclosed by Musk in March this year. At that time, he announced that SpaceX and Tesla would build two advanced chip factories within a large campus in Austin, Texas. One would serve the automotive and humanoid robot businesses, while the other would be specifically designed for AI data centers in space. Terafab 项目最早由马斯克于今年 3 月披露。彼时他宣布，SpaceX 将与特斯拉在德克萨斯州奥斯汀市的大型园区内建造两座先进芯片工厂。其中一座用于服务汽车与人形机器人业务，另一座则专为太空中的 AI 数据中心设计。

item.title: 存储大涨受益者：三星一季度净赚 2600 亿，单季利润超去年全年
item.guid: 存储大涨受益者：三星一季度净赚-2600-亿，单季利润超去年全年
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Samsung Electronics yesterday (April 7) released its unaudited performance guidance for the first quarter of this year: 据界面新闻报道，三星电子于昨日（4 月 7 日）发布今年第一季度未经审计业绩指引：

Consolidated operating profit for the quarter is expected to reach 57.2 trillion Korean Won (approximately 261.1 billion RMB), a year-on-year increase of up to 755%, setting a new historical record for Samsung's quarterly earnings. It also surpassed last year's full-year total operating profit of 43.6 trillion Korean Won, marking the strongest single-quarter earnings performance in Korean corporate history. Official data shows that consolidated sales in the first quarter were approximately 133 trillion Korean Won, a year-on-year increase of 68.1%.

The report states that this surge in performance was driven by a confluence of multiple positive factors: 报道称，此次业绩爆发由多重利好共振驱动：

    Soaring Storage Prices : According to TrendForce data, DRAM contract prices rose by 90% 95% quarter-on-quarter in the first quarter of this year, while NAND flash memory increased by 55% 60%;

    AI Demand Pull : Computing power giants like Nvidia and AMD continue to snap up capacity, with a single AI server requiring several times the amount of HBM and DRAM compared to a regular server;

    DS Division Boom : The Device Solutions division's operating profit in the first quarter is expected to exceed 42 trillion Korean Won, accounting for over 70% of total profit, with HBM business revenue growing by over 300% year-on-year.

The 57.2 trillion Korean Won profit in the first quarter of this year is nearly 3 times that of the fourth quarter of last year and 8.5 times that of the same period last year, far exceeding market expectations—the consensus forecast from 29 analysts compiled by the London Stock Exchange Group was 40.5 trillion Korean Won, and Citibank's optimistic forecast was only 51 trillion Korean Won. 今年一季度 57.2 万亿韩元的利润，是去年第四季度的近 3 倍、去年同期的 8.5 倍，远超市场预期——伦敦证券交易所集团汇总 29 位分析师的共识预期为 40.5 万亿韩元，花旗银行的乐观预期也仅为 51 万亿韩元。

Citibank expects Samsung's full-year operating profit to reach 310 trillion Korean Won this year, a year-on-year increase of over 6 times; institutions such as Goldman Sachs and Nomura Securities have also raised target prices and reiterated "buy" ratings, expecting DRAM prices to rise by another 58% 63% in the second quarter, and NAND flash memory by 70% 75%. 花旗银行预计三星今年全年营业利润有望达 310 万亿韩元，同比增长超 6 倍；高盛、野村证券等机构亦上调目标价并重申买入评级，预计二季度 DRAM 价格再涨 58% 63%，NAND 闪存涨幅将达 70% 75%。

item.title: 小鹏汽车辟谣碰撞后「车顶都没了」：系消防破拆救援，将追究造谣者法律责任
item.guid: 小鹏汽车辟谣碰撞后「车顶都没了」：系消防破拆救援，将追究造谣者法律责任
item.description:
On the afternoon of April 5, a single-vehicle collision occurred in Guangyuan, Sichuan. The accident vehicle was an Xpeng car, and two occupants were injured. 4 月 5 日下午，四川广元发生一起单车碰撞事故，事故车辆为小鹏汽车，车内两名人员受伤。

After the accident, some social media accounts spread photos of the vehicle wreckage after fire department demolition out of context, using phrases like "roof gone" and "completely disintegrated," misleading professional rescue operations as vehicle quality issues and sparking public doubts about Xpeng vehicles' safety. 事故发生后，部分社交平台账号将消防破拆后的车辆残骸照片断章取义传播，使用「顶没了」「彻底散架」等措辞，将专业救援操作误导为车辆质量问题，引发舆论对小鹏车辆安全性的质疑。

Yesterday, Xpeng Motors' legal department issued a statement to clarify the matter: After firefighters arrived, they performed a physical demolition of the vehicle body based on professional judgment to safely remove the injured. Xpeng Motors staff rushed to the scene immediately to participate in the rescue and provided necessary support to the injured and their families. 昨天，小鹏汽车法务部发布声明对此事予以澄清：消防人员到场后，根据专业判断对车体实施了物理破拆，将伤员安全移出。小鹏汽车工作人员第一时间赶赴现场参与救援，并向受伤人员及家属提供了必要支持。

Xpeng's legal department pointed out that the car doors could still be opened normally after the accident, and the fire department's cutting of the roof was a professional operation performed according to standard emergency rescue procedures to avoid secondary injuries, unrelated to structural damage caused by the collision itself. 小鹏法务部指出，事故发生后车门仍可正常开启，消防对车顶实施切除系为避免二次伤害、依照标准应急救援流程执行的专业操作，与碰撞本身造成的结构损毁无关。

The statement also indicated that the company has completed evidence collection against the relevant rumor-mongering entities, will pursue legal responsibility in accordance with the law, and pledged to continue assisting customers with follow-up matters. 声明同时表示，公司已对相关造谣主体完成证据固定，将依法追究法律责任，并承诺继续协助客户处理后续事宜。

item.title: 十部门联合印发 AI 伦理审查办法，人机融合等高风险研发须经专家复核
item.guid: 十部门联合印发-AI-伦理审查办法，人机融合等高风险研发须经专家复核
item.description:
Recently, ten departments, including the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, the National Development and Reform Commission, the Ministry of Education, and the Ministry of Science and Technology, jointly issued the "Measures for the Review and Service of AI Scientific and Technological Ethics (Trial)," establishing a systematic institutional framework for AI scientific and technological ethics review and service in China. 近日，工信部联合发改委、教育部、科技部等共十个部门，正式印发《人工智能科技伦理审查与服务办法（试行）》，为我国 AI 科技伦理审查与服务工作确立系统性制度框架。

The "Measures" cover AI scientific research and technological development activities within China that may pose ethical risks, requiring that scientific and technological ethical requirements be integrated throughout the entire process, adhering to seven principles: promoting human well-being, respecting the right to life, upholding fairness and justice, reasonably controlling risks, maintaining openness and transparency, protecting privacy and security, and ensuring controllability and trustworthiness. 《办法》覆盖境内可能带来伦理风险的 AI 科学研究与技术开发活动，要求将科技伦理要求贯穿全过程，遵循增进人类福祉、尊重生命权利、坚持公平公正、合理控制风险、保持公开透明、保护隐私安全、确保可控可信七项原则。

Regarding the review mechanism, the "Measures" establish four types of procedures: general procedures must be decided within 30 days after acceptance; emergency procedures apply to urgent situations such as sudden public incidents and must be completed within 72 hours. Each unit must establish an Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Ethics Committee as the responsible entity; those without one can entrust a professional service center to undertake the task. 在审查机制上，《办法》设立四类程序：一般程序须在受理后 30 日内作出决定；应急程序适用于突发公共事件等紧急情形，须在 72 小时内完成。各单位须设立人工智能科技伦理委员会作为责任主体，未设立者可委托专业服务中心承接。

The "Measures" also simultaneously release a list of high-risk activities requiring expert review, covering three categories: 《办法》同步发布须经专家复核的高风险活动清单，涵盖三类：

    Research and development of human-machine fusion systems that have a strong impact on human subjective behavior, psychological emotions, and life health;

    Research and development of algorithmic models, applications, and systems with public opinion and social mobilization capabilities, and social consciousness guidance capabilities;

    Research and development of highly autonomous automated decision-making systems for safety and personal health risk scenarios.

item.title: Sand.ai 完成逾 5000 万美元融资
item.guid: Sand.ai-完成逾-5000-万美元融资
item.description:
According to informed sources, Sand.ai, a leading company in the Video Agent sector, recently completed a new round of financing totaling approximately $50 million. 据知情人士透露，Video Agent 赛道明星公司 Sand.ai 近期完成新一轮约 5000 万美元融资。

Sand.ai's product, VidMuse, broke through ten million dollars in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) within just 2 months of its launch, becoming the fastest product in the Video Agent sector to achieve this commercial milestone. Sand.ai 旗下产品 VidMuse 上线仅 2 个月，年度经常性收入（ARR）即突破千万美元，成为 Video Agent 赛道达成这一商业化里程碑速度最快的产品。

VidMuse pioneered the "Music in Video Out" paradigm, focusing on audio-driven video creation, with its underlying technology stemming from Sand.ai's self-developed audio and video native architecture. VidMuse 首创「Music in Video Out」（音乐生视频）范式，以音频驱动视频创作为核心，底层技术来自 Sand.ai 自研的音视频原生架构。

item.title: 千寻智能完成新一轮 10 亿元融资
item.guid: 千寻智能完成新一轮-10-亿元融资
item.description:
On April 7, embodied intelligence company Qianxun Intelligent announced the completion of a new round of 1 billion yuan financing, co-led by Shunwei Capital and Yunfeng Fund, with participation from institutions such as Dacheng Caizhi, a leading RMB fund, Galaxy Yuanhui, Turing Fund, Xinding Capital, and Gengxin Capital. 4 月 7 日，具身智能公司千寻智能宣布完成新一轮 10 亿元融资，由顺为资本与云锋基金联合领投，达晨财智、某头部人民币基金、银河源汇、图灵基金、新鼎资本、庚辛资本等机构参与跟投。

This marks Qianxun Intelligent's second major financing round completed within 30 days. In February this year, the company just completed nearly 2 billion yuan in financing, bringing the total cumulative financing for both rounds to 3 billion yuan. 这已是千寻智能 30 天内完成的第二笔大额融资。今年 2 月，公司刚完成近 20 亿元融资，两轮合计累计融资额达 30 亿元。

item.title: 面壁智能完成新一轮数亿元人民币融资
item.guid: 面壁智能完成新一轮数亿元人民币融资
item.description:
Minibox Intelligent announced yesterday the completion of a new round of several hundred million RMB in financing. This round was co-led by Shenzhen Capital Group (SCGC) and Huichuan Industrial Investment, with follow-on investments from institutions such as Daohe Long-term Investment, Guotai Junan Innovation Investment, and Wuyuefeng Sci-tech. 面壁智能昨日宣布完成新一轮数亿元人民币融资。本轮由深圳市创新投资集团（深创投）和汇川产投联合领投，道禾长期投资、国泰君安创新投、武岳峰科创等机构跟投。

It is reported that this is Minibox Intelligent's second round of financing completed this year. After the Spring Festival this year, the company just completed a round of financing led by China Telecom. In total, Minibox Intelligent's cumulative financing this year has exceeded 1 billion RMB. 据悉，这已是面壁智能今年完成的第二轮融资。今年春节过后，该公司刚刚完成由中国电信领投的一轮融资。两轮合计，面壁智能今年累计融资规模已超 10 亿元人民币。

item.title: 💡 野兽先生自曝每天工作超 15 小时：我活着就是为了工作
item.guid: 💡-野兽先生自曝每天工作超-15-小时：我活着就是为了工作
item.description:
According to Business Insider, YouTube's top creator "MrBeast" (real name Jimmy Donaldson) recently revealed his daily work routine in a video conversation with creator Jon Youshaei, a rare disclosure. 据《商业内幕》报道，YouTube 头部创作者「野兽先生」MrBeast（真名 Jimmy Donaldson）近日在与创作者 Jon Youshaei 的视频对话中，罕见披露了自己的日常工作状态。

He stated that during the production of the Amazon show "Beast Games," "working less than 15 hours a day was a miracle," and his schedule was "precisely planned down to the minute." 他表示，在制作亚马逊节目《Beast Games》期间，「一天（工作）不足 15 小时简直是奇迹」，日程被「精确规划到每分钟」。

MrBeast frankly admitted that he "lives to work" and directly wrote on the X platform: "I 100% do not have a healthy work-life balance." He added that this intensity of work "is not a fair reference for most people," but he himself has no intention of slowing down. MrBeast 坦言自己「活着就是为了工作」，并在 X 平台上直接写道：「我 100% 没有健康的工作与生活平衡。」他同时补充，这种工作强度「对大多数人来说并不是一个公平的参照」，但他本人并无放缓的打算。

To maximize his limited time, MrBeast established a highly specialized operational system. Taking YouTube thumbnail images as an example, he specifically employs a stand-in who is responsible for completing thumbnail composition work in advance, from Monday to Friday, nine to five, ensuring that MrBeast himself can quickly complete the shoot upon arrival. 为了将有限时间发挥到极致，MrBeast 建立了一套高度分工的运作体系。以 YouTube 封面图为例，他专门配备了一名替身，负责从周一到周五、朝九晚五地提前完成封面构图工作，确保 MrBeast 本人到场即可快速完成拍摄。

In terms of team building, MrBeast's expansion pace is equally aggressive. In 2024, he brought in former Shutterfly CEO and venture capitalist Jeffrey Housenbold to serve as CEO of Beast Industries, and subsequently recruited executives from companies such as TikTok, Snap, and NBCUniversal. 在团队建设层面，MrBeast 的扩张步伐同样激进。2024 年，他引入前 Shutterfly CEO、风险投资人 Jeffrey Housenbold 出任 Beast Industries 的 CEO，随后陆续从 TikTok、Snap、NBCUniversal 等公司招募高管。

Housenbold recently revealed on LinkedIn that Beast Industries plans to expand its team by 50% this year, with recruitment covering New York, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Chicago, and the company's headquarters in Greenville, North Carolina, for roles spanning creative, engineering, marketing, product, and production, among other areas. Housenbold 近日在领英上透露，Beast Industries 计划今年将团队规模扩大 50%，招聘范围覆盖纽约、洛杉矶、旧金山、芝加哥以及公司总部所在地北卡罗来纳州格林维尔，岗位横跨创意、工程、市场营销、产品与制作等多个方向。

item.title: 三星阔折叠系统界面曝光
item.guid: 三星阔折叠系统界面曝光
item.description: According to Android Authority, the latest extracted system animations are primarily used to demonstrate the cover screen mirroring feature of the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide. Both system UI screenshots obtained also contain the character "H8" in their filenames, a string previously confirmed to be the internal development codename for Samsung's Wide Fold project. Based on the proportions of the system assets exposed this time, the unfolded aspect ratio of the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide screen is approximately 1.3:1. Compared to the nearly square ratio of about 1.11:1 for the currently available standard Galaxy Z Fold, the new model has been significantly stretched horizontally in its physical form, directly altering the device's basic display area and grip ratio. 据 Android Authority 报道，最新提取的系统动画主要用于演示 Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide 的外屏镜像（cover screen mirroring）功能。 同时获取的两张系统 UI 截图文件名中均包含「H8」字符，该字符串此前已被证实为三星宽版折叠屏项目（Wide Fold）的内部研发代号。 基于此次曝光的系统素材比例进行测算，Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide 屏幕的展开长宽比约为 1.3:1。 相较于现售标准版 Galaxy Z Fold 约 1.11:1 的近方形比例，新机型在横向物理形态上进行了明显拉伸，直接改变了设备的基础显示面积与握持比例。

item.title: 红米 K90 Max 配备风冷散热：百秒降 10℃
item.guid: 红米-K90-Max-配备风冷散热：百秒降-10℃
item.description:
Yesterday, REDMI officially unveiled the K90 Max, with the new phone set to be released this month. 昨天，REDMI 手机正式公布了 K90 Max，新机将于本月发布。

According to reports, the K90 Max will feature a new generation of powerful dual chips and a 165Hz high-refresh-rate gaming screen. 据介绍，K90 Max 将提供新一代狂暴双芯、165Hz 高刷电竞屏。

At the same time, the new machine is equipped with a brand-new air-cooled heat dissipation system, featuring a large-sized fan, a vertical air intake design, and a simulated vortex air duct. According to official introductions, the new machine's cooling performance can achieve a "10℃ drop in 100 seconds." 同时新机配备全新风冷散热系统，搭载大尺寸风扇，采用直立式进风设计和仿真涡流风道。据官方介绍，新机散热表现可做到「100 秒直降 10℃」。

Furthermore, judging from the newly released images of the device, the K90 Max adopts a horizontal large-sized lens module design and is equipped with a rear dual camera setup. 另从公布的新机图片来看，K90 Max 采用横向大尺寸镜头模组设计，配备后置双摄。

item.title: 好莱坞演员造出最强 AI 记忆系统：白天出镜，晚上 Vibe Coding
item.guid: 好莱坞演员造出最强-AI-记忆系统：白天出镜，晚上-Vibe-Coding
item.description:
Recently, Milla Jovovich, the protagonist of the "Resident Evil" series and a Hollywood actress, open-sourced an AI memory system called MemPalace on GitHub. Developed by her and her friend Ben Sigman, the project achieved the highest score to date in the LongMemEval benchmark test. 近期，《生化危机》系列女主角、好莱坞女演员米拉·乔沃维奇（Milla Jovovich）在 GitHub 上开源了一套名为 MemPalace 的 AI 记忆系统，该项目由她与好友 Ben Sigman 共同开发，在 LongMemEval 基准测试中取得了迄今为止的最高分。

MemPalace's core design draws inspiration from the ancient Greek "memory palace" technique, dividing memory space into four levels: Wing (people/projects), Room (topics), Closet (compressed summaries), and Drawer (original files). The palace structure itself can lead to a 34% improvement in retrieval accuracy. MemPalace 的核心设计借鉴古希腊「记忆宫殿」技法，将记忆空间分为 Wing（人物 / 项目）、Room（话题）、Closet（压缩摘要）、Drawer（原始文件）四个层级，宫殿结构本身即可带来 34% 的检索精度提升。

    AAAK Compression: Self-developed lossless compression dialect, 30x compression ratio, compatible with mainstream models like Claude, GPT, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, etc., no cloud API required, runs entirely locally;

    Benchmark Test: LongMemEval R@5 pure local mode scored 96.6%, hybrid mode (with Haiku reordering) reached 100% (500/500), surpassing commercial products like Mem0 and Zep;

    Integration Support: Connects with tools like Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor via MCP protocol, providing 19 interfaces; built-in SQLite-based knowledge graph and conflict detection features;

    Completely Free: Compared to Mem0's subscription prices of $19 to $249 per month and Zep's starting at $25 per month, MemPalace is open-sourced under the MIT license, with zero cost.

Currently, MemPalace has been open-sourced on GitHub under the MIT license, garnering over 4000 Stars in less than two days since its release. 目前，MemPalace 已在 GitHub 以 MIT 协议开源，发布不足两天已获得超过 4000 个 Star。

Jovovich was born in Kyiv, Soviet Ukraine, in 1975. She is well-known to domestic audiences for her roles in films such as "The Fifth Element" and the "Resident Evil" series, and has also been active in modeling and music. Her cross-industry entry into the AI open-source community has attracted widespread attention. 乔沃维奇 1975 年生于苏联乌克兰基辅，因出演《第五元素》《生化危机》系列等影片为国内观众熟知，此前亦活跃于模特、音乐等领域。此次跨界进入 AI 开源社区，引发广泛关注。

💻 GitHub: github.com/milla-jovovich/mempalace 💻 GitHub: github.com/milla-jovovich/mempalace

item.title: 智元开源首个覆盖具身智能全域研究的真实场景数据集 AGIBOT WORLD 2026
item.guid: 智元开源首个覆盖具身智能全域研究的真实场景数据集-AGIBOT-WORLD-2026
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhimeta Robotics announced the open-sourcing of the AGIBOT WORLD 2026 dataset, which is currently the first open-source dataset covering the entire field of embodied AI research. 昨天，智元机器人宣布开源 AGIBOT WORLD 2026 数据集，这是目前首个覆盖具身智能全域研究的开源数据集。

It is reported that this dataset is collected from 100% real environments, built around five major embodied research themes, and will be continuously open-sourced in five stages. Simulation data will also be released synchronously through digital twin technology. The core specifications are as follows: 据悉，该数据集基于 100% 真实环境采集，围绕五大具身领域研究主题构建，将分五个阶段持续开源，仿真数据亦通过数字孪生技术同步释出。核心规格如下：

    Collection Scenarios : Various real environments such as commercial spaces, hotel catering, homes, security scenarios, and industrial logistics;

    Collection Hardware : Based on the Elf G2 general-purpose robot, equipped with high-performance joint actuators, multiple types of sensors and a high-performance domain controller, combined with the Swift Picker gripper and OmniHand five-finger dexterous hand, simultaneously collecting multi-view RGB(D), tactile, LiDAR point cloud, IMU, full-body joint state, force sensor, and other multimodal data;

    Collection Technology : Whole Body Control allows the robotic arm, waist, and hand to work collaboratively; beyond-visual-range teleoperation supports data collectors to control robots across regions in real-time and share first-person perception; force control collection fully records contact and force feedback information;

    Quality Inspection Process : All data undergoes algorithm strategy training and real-machine test verification, and is subjected to multiple rounds of screening and cleaning through the DaaS industrial quality inspection pipeline.

Zhimeta Robotics released AGIBOT WORLD, the embodied AI industry's first million-real-machine dataset, at the end of 2024. This 2026 version represents a comprehensive upgrade in data quality and research coverage depth. 智元机器人于 2024 年末曾发布具身智能行业首个百万真机数据集 AGIBOT WORLD，此次 2026 版本是其在数据质量与研究覆盖深度上的全面升级。

item.title: 扣子推出 Agent World，为 AI 智能体配备云设备与专属邮箱
item.guid: 扣子推出-Agent-World，为-AI-智能体配备云设备与专属邮箱
item.description:
Coze officially released version 2.5 yesterday, introducing the new "Agent World" ecosystem, with comprehensive upgrades focusing on three major areas: cloud devices, skill expansion, and AI agent personality. 扣子（Coze）昨天正式发布 2.5 版本，推出「Agent World」全新生态体系，围绕云设备、技能扩展与 AI 智能体人格三大方向进行全面升级。

    Regarding cloud devices, AI agents gain independent cloud PCs and cloud phones, capable of running scripts and operating apps in a real system environment, and synchronizing screen displays to users via real-time streaming, with tasks running independently in the background throughout;

    At the skill level, a video creation AI agent based on Seedance 2.0 is built-in, and the Coze programming CLI is launched simultaneously; the skill store introduces professional Skills from industries such as law and finance, with the financial Skill jointly developed with Guosen Securities;

    Regarding memory and identity, AI agents adopt a new memory layer architecture, allowing memory to be shared across channels and permissions isolated by session, while also being equipped with an independent dedicated mailbox for registering third-party platforms and external communication;

    At the ecosystem level, "Xiapin" Skill Evaluation Plaza, "Agent Link" social site, and PlayLab Board Game Lab are launched, building an open community for AI agent interactive learning.

Currently, some features are in a limited-time trial phase, and users can experience them via coze.cn or the Coze App. 目前部分功能处于限时体验阶段，用户可通过 coze.cn 或扣子 App 进行体验。

item.title: 麦当劳 CEO 回应试吃「翻车」：都怪我妈妈
item.guid: 麦当劳-CEO-回应试吃「翻车」：都怪我妈妈
item.description:
According to Business Insider, McDonald's CEO Chris Kempczinski recently spoke with The Wall Street Journal about the Big Arch burger tasting video from February that unexpectedly went viral. He attributed the "flop" to his mother: 据《商业内幕》报道，麦当劳 CEO 克里斯·坎普钦斯基（Chris Kempczinski）近日接受《华尔街日报》采访，谈及今年 2 月那段令他意外走红的 Big Arch 汉堡试吃视频。他将这次「翻车」的责任归咎于自己的母亲：

My mom taught me from a young age not to talk with my mouth full, and I think I should have ignored that rule then.

On February 4th this year, Kempczinski posted a short video on Instagram of himself tasting McDonald's new Big Arch burger. The video quickly sparked widespread discussion on social media. 今年 2 月 4 日，坎普钦斯基在 Instagram 上发布了一段亲自试吃麦当劳新品 Big Arch 汉堡的短视频。视频迅速在社交媒体上引发广泛讨论。

Netizens pointed out that he took a tiny bite, remained expressionless throughout, repeatedly referred to the burger as a "product," and showed almost no chewing motion, with his overall performance described as "robotic." The video currently has over 16 million views. 网友纷纷指出他咬了极小一口、全程面无表情、反复将汉堡称为「产品（product）」，且几乎看不出咀嚼动作，整体表现被形容为「机器人式」。该视频目前播放量已超过 1600 万次。

Kempczinski stated that he first learned about the video "going wrong" from his children. They called and said, "Dad, you're trending, but it's not good." However, he wasn't too concerned about it, instead believing that this unexpected traffic brought more exposure to Big Arch. 坎普钦斯基表示，他最初是从自己的孩子那里得知视频「出事」的。对方打来电话说：「爸，你上热搜了，但不是好事。」不过他对此并不太在意，反而认为这波意外的流量为 Big Arch 带来了更多曝光

He also used this opportunity to discuss a new logic for brand communication: in today's "creator economy" era, consumers and brands jointly shape brand image, and "the idea that one can control everything is no longer applicable to the world we live in." 他还借此谈及品牌传播的新逻辑：在当下的「创作者经济」时代，消费者与品牌共同塑造品牌形象，「那种认为自己能掌控一切的想法，已经不适用于我们所处的这个世界了。」

It's worth noting that he also took the opportunity in the interview to clarify a long-standing rumor— he is not a vegetarian . 值得注意的是，他在采访中还顺带澄清了一则流传已久的传言—— 他并非素食主义者 。

item.title: 今年清明假期出行超 8.4 亿人次，同比增长 5.6%
item.guid: 今年清明假期出行超-8.4-亿人次，同比增长-5.6%
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, the Ministry of Transport yesterday released data showing that during this year's Qingming Festival holiday (April 4th to 6th), the total cross-regional passenger flow reached 842.695 million person-times, with an average daily of 280.898 million person-times, a year-on-year increase of 5.6% compared to last year's Qingming holiday. 据新华社报道，交通运输部昨天发布数据显示，今年清明假期（4 月 4 日至 6 日）全社会跨区域人员流动量达 84269.5 万人次，日均 28089.8 万人次，较去年清明假期同比增长 5.6%。

    Road passenger flow was 775.54 million person-times, with an average daily of 258.51 million person-times, a year-on-year increase of 5.4%;

    Railway passenger volume was 57.79 million person-times, with an average daily of 19.26 million person-times, a year-on-year increase of 8.4%;

    Waterway passenger volume was 3.677 million person-times, with an average daily of 1.226 million person-times, a year-on-year increase of 8.4%;

    Civil aviation passenger volume was 5.688 million person-times, with an average daily of 1.896 million person-times, a year-on-year increase of 1.6%.

Overall, railway and waterway passenger transport saw the most significant growth, both reaching 8.4%, while civil aviation growth was relatively moderate. Road transport remains the main mode of travel, accounting for over 90% of the total flow. 整体来看，铁路与水路客运增速最为显著，均达 8.4%，民航增速相对平缓，公路仍是出行主力，占总流动量逾九成。

item.title: 京东实习生被限用拼多多
item.guid: 京东实习生被限用拼多多
item.description:
According to Bianews, a JD.com intern recently posted on social media claiming that after connecting to the company's intranet, Pinduoduo's "Billions in Subsidies" event "vanished" within the app and could not be used normally. 据鞭牛士报道，近日，一名京东实习生在社交平台发文称，连接公司内网后，拼多多百亿补贴活动在 App 内「蒸发」，无法正常使用。

Some joked, "Is this such a simple business war?" Others believed that this move was to prevent JD.com insiders from investigating the prices of competitor marketing activities, which is a normal competitive protection measure. However, some netizens also raised privacy and security concerns, believing that such restrictions might involve "illegal investigation of personal information." 有人调侃「这么朴实的商战吗？」，也有人认为此举是为了防止京东内部人员探查竞品营销活动的价格，属于正常的竞争保护行为。但同时也有网友对此提出隐私安全质疑，认为此类限制涉嫌「非法调查个人信息」。

The report points out that such situations are not isolated cases. Former employees of Qunar and Ctrip stated that they were restricted from using Meituan during their employment; a former Alibaba intern revealed that when using Pinduoduo during their internship, the 10 billion yuan subsidy was restricted and only lifted two years later; Meituan employees reported that they could not log in to Taobao after connecting to the company's internal network, with the page displaying 'Your access is denied'; Pinduoduo employees, on the other hand, claimed that their Taobao account had experienced abnormalities during their employment. 报道指出，此类情况并非个例。去哪儿、携程前员工表示，在职期间曾被限制使用美团；一名阿里前实习生透露，实习期间使用拼多多时百亿补贴遭到限制，两年后才解除；美团员工反映，连接公司内网后无法登录淘宝，页面显示「您的访问被拒绝」；拼多多员工则称，在职期间淘宝账号曾出现异常。

item.title: 《穿普拉达的女王 2》发布终极预告
item.guid: 《穿普拉达的女王-2》发布终极预告
item.description:
According to blogger 'Watchmen Hollywood', "The Devil Wears Prada 2" released its final trailer yesterday. The film will be released in mainland China on April 30th this year, and in North America on May 1st, approximately three weeks before its official release. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，《穿普拉达的女王 2》昨日发布终极预告，影片将于今年 4 月 30 日在中国内地上映，北美则于 5 月 1 日公映，距正式上映还有约三周时间。

In the trailer, protagonist Miranda's line "I just love work" continues the classic style of the strong female lead from the original. Additionally, the trailer also revealed a snippet of Lady Gaga and rapper Doechii's collaborative performance of the film's original new song "Runway". 预告片中，主角米兰达一句「我就是爱工作」延续了原作中强势女主的经典风格。此外，预告还曝光了 Lady Gaga 与说唱歌手 Doechii 联手演唱影片原创新歌《Runway》的片段。

The script was penned by the first film's screenwriter, Aline Brosh McKenna. The story focuses on the overall downturn in the contemporary publishing industry, with fashion magazine Runway affected by financial pressure. Miranda's career falls into a predicament, forcing her to seek cooperation with Emily, now a luxury group executive, to secure advertising funds from the latter's company, bringing the former workplace rivals face to face once again. 剧本由第一部编剧艾莲·布洛什·麦肯纳操刀续写。故事背景聚焦当代出版业的整体低迷，时尚杂志 Runway 受财务压力波及，米兰达的事业陷入困境，不得不向现任奢侈品集团高管艾米丽寻求合作，以争取后者公司的广告资金投入，昔日的职场对手再度交锋。

item.title: 匠妹新歌《House Tour》发布 MV
item.guid: 匠妹新歌《House-Tour》发布-MV
item.description:
Recently, Sabrina Carpenter officially released the official music video for her new single "House Tour". This song is included in her 2025 album "Man's Best Friend", and the MV was co-directed by Carpenter and actress Margaret Qualley, marking Carpenter's debut as an MV director. 近日，Sabrina Carpenter 正式发布新单曲《House Tour》的官方 MV。这首歌曲收录于她 2025 年的专辑《Man’s Best Friend》，MV 由 Carpenter 与女演员 Margaret Qualley 联合执导，也是 Carpenter 首次担任 MV 导演。

In the MV, Carpenter, Margaret Qualley, and Madelyn Cline form a "charm theft trio", breaking into a mansion to ransack it, enjoying themselves in a bathtub, discovering the original "Mona Lisa", and casually taking a Grammy award. MV 中，Carpenter 与 Margaret Qualley、Madelyn Cline 组成一支「魅力盗窃三人组」，闯入豪宅后大肆搜刮，在浴缸中享乐、发现《蒙娜丽莎》原作，并顺手带走一座格莱美奖杯。

Carpenter wrote on Instagram: "The MV for 'House Tour' is now live!! Starring the most beautiful cleaner in the world, my dear @isimostar and my angel @madelyncline, co-directed by Margaret and me! 💘" Carpenter 在 Instagram 上写道：「《House Tour》的 MV 现已上线！！主演是世界上最美的清洁工，我亲爱的 @isimostar 和我的天使 @madelyncline，由 margaret 和我联合执导！💘」
